texto: What do Americans know about morality? They don't want their presidents to have penises but they don't mind if their presidents covertly arrange to support the Nicaraguan rebel forces after Congress has restricted such aid
autor: they don't want their presidents to deceive their wives but they don't mind if their presidents deceive Congress—lie to the people and violate the people's constitution!
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de they don't want their presidents to deceive their wives but they don't mind if their presidents deceive Congress—lie to the people and violate the people's constitution! que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “What do Americans know about morality? They don't want their presidents to have penises but they …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, john-irving, presidents, com foco em reflexao.
